meta.title: Local Model Engine Roadmap
meta.purpose: Turn the lattice companion from a visual map into a sequence of runnable local engines.

engines.label: Engine 00: Lattice Console
engines.description: Local browser map generated from the node seed. No external model calls or credits.

engines.label: Engine 01: Nest 1 Formal Invariant Model
engines.description: Pure-Python invariant scoring demo for rotations, reflections, scaling drift, and noisy control transforms.

engines.label: Engine 02: Nest 2 Matter / Chemistry Model
engines.description: Local element, molecule, material, food-chemistry, and reaction comparator. Later adapters: RDKit, ASE, pymatgen, MatGL, CHGNet, MACE, MatterGen.

engines.label: Engine 03: Nest 3 Coherence / Physics Model
engines.description: Local oscillator and resonance model first; later PhysicsNeMo adapter for physics AI and field-system simulations.

engines.label: Engine 04: Nest 4 Biology / Biosignal Model
engines.description: Local HRV/EEG and biology-feature model using exported CSV/session packs first; later live device adapters.

engines.label: Engine 05: Nest 5 Convergence Model
engines.description: Cross-nest comparison engine that tests whether the same score grammar recurs across completed classes.
